tree.name: Anthony Davis
tree.tradeDescription: 3-team trade (WAS/DAL/CHA): WAS sent Middleton, AJ Johnson, Bagley to DAL, Branham to CHA. DAL also received 2026 1st (OKC), 2030 1st (GSW), 3 future 2nds. CHA sent Tyus Jones to DAL. WAS received AD, Hardy, Russell, Exum.
tree.note: 10x All-Star acquired from Dallas in 9-player, 3-team deal

assetsGivenUp.name: Khris Middleton
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 4-team trade (WAS/MIL/NYK/SAS): WAS sent Kuzma, Patrick Baldwin Jr. (to SAS), 2025 2nd, 2026 2nd to MIL. MIL sent Middleton, AJ Johnson, 2028 1st to WAS. NYK sent Sims to MIL, Lessort to WAS. MIL sent Besson, Wright, cash to NYK, cash to SAS.
assetsGivenUp.note: 3x All-Star from Milwaukee

assetsGivenUp.name: Kyle Kuzma
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 5-team trade: WAS sent Westbrook, Hutchison, multiple 2nds to LAL/SAS/BRK. LAL sent Kuzma, KCP, Harrell to WAS. BRK sent Dinwiddie, 2025 2nd to WAS. IND sent Holiday, Todd to WAS.
assetsGivenUp.note: Originally acquired from Lakers in 5-team Westbrook deal

assetsGivenUp.name: Russell Westbrook
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: WAS traded John Wall + 2023 1st (lottery protected) to HOU for Westbrook
assetsGivenUp.note: MVP point guard acquired from Houston

assetsGivenUp.name: John Wall
assetsGivenUp.note: #1 overall pick — franchise cornerstone for a decade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2023 1st Round Pick (#4)
assetsGivenUp.note: Sent to Houston, conveyed #4 overall

assetsGivenUp.name: Patrick Baldwin Jr.
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: WAS traded Chris Paul to GSW for Baldwin Jr., Poole, Rollins, 2027 2nd (GSW), 2030 1st (GSW)
assetsGivenUp.note: Acquired from Golden State in Chris Paul trade. Sent to SAS as part of 4-team Middleton deal.

assetsGivenUp.name: Chris Paul
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 3-team trade (WAS/PHX/IND): WAS sent Bradley Beal, Goodwin, Todd to PHX; Walker (#8) + 2029 2nd to IND. PHX sent Chris Paul, Shamet, Coulibaly (#7), multiple picks/swaps, cash to WAS. PHX sent 2028 2nd to IND.
assetsGivenUp.note: Future HOF point guard, salary filler from Beal trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Bradley Beal
assetsGivenUp.note: #3 overall pick by WAS in 2012 NBA Draft — franchise star for a decade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2025 2nd Round Pick (#39)
assetsGivenUp.note: Second most favorable of DET/PHO/GSW picks, sent to Milwaukee

assetsGivenUp.name: 2026 2nd Round Pick
assetsGivenUp.note: Protected top 55, sent to Milwaukee

assetsGivenUp.name: AJ Johnson
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 4-team trade: received with Middleton from Milwaukee. Same deal — see Middleton for full cost breakdown.
assetsGivenUp.note: Shared cost with Khris Middleton — same 4-team trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Kyle Kuzma
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 5-team trade: WAS sent Westbrook to LAL for Kuzma, KCP, Harrell + others. See Middleton chain for full history.
assetsGivenUp.note: Shared cost — same Kuzma asset sent to MIL for both Middleton and AJ Johnson Shared cost — see primary branch for full chain.

assetsGivenUp.name: Malaki Branham
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: WAS traded Kelly Olynyk to SAS for Branham, Blake Wesley, and 2026 2nd (least favorable of DAL/PHI/OKC)
assetsGivenUp.note: Former #20 overall pick (2022), acquired from San Antonio. Sent to Charlotte in AD trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: Kelly Olynyk
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 3-team trade (WAS/NOP/HOU): WAS sent Poole, Saddiq Bey, Micah Peavy (#40) to NOP. NOP sent McCollum, Olynyk, 2027 2nd (CHI) to WAS. HOU sent Whitmore to WAS for 2026 2nd + 2029 2nd.
assetsGivenUp.note: Veteran big from New Orleans, flipped to SAS for Branham

assetsGivenUp.name: Jordan Poole
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: WAS traded Chris Paul to GSW for Baldwin Jr., Poole, Rollins, 2027 2nd (GSW), 2030 1st (GSW)
assetsGivenUp.note: Acquired from GSW in Chris Paul trade (shared cost with Patrick Baldwin Jr. — see Middleton > Baldwin chain for full Beal origin).

assetsGivenUp.name: Saddiq Bey
assetsGivenUp.note: Signed as FA to multi-year deal. Sent to NOP in 2025 3-team trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2025 2nd Round Pick (#40)
assetsGivenUp.note: WAS own 2nd round pick, sent to NOP

assetsGivenUp.name: Marvin Bagley III
assetsGivenUp.note: Re-signed as FA on 1-year deal after being traded to MEM at Feb 2025 deadline

assetsGivenUp.name: 2026 1st Round Pick (via OKC)
assetsGivenUp.note: Thunder's 2026 1st round pick, sent to Dallas

assetsGivenUp.name: 2030 1st Round Pick (via GSW)
assetsGivenUp.note: Warriors' 2030 1st, top-20 protected, sent to Dallas. Originally acquired from GSW in Chris Paul trade (July 2023).

assetsGivenUp.name: 2026 2nd Round Pick via PHX
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Acquired from Phoenix in the Bradley Beal 3-team trade. Sent to Dallas in the AD trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2027 2nd Round Pick via CHI
assetsGivenUp.note: Sent to Dallas in the Anthony Davis trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2029 2nd Round Pick via HOU
assetsGivenUp.note: Sent to Dallas in the Anthony Davis trade.
